landing.heroDescription: Upload your documents and understand unfamiliar words in context.
landing.marqueeAriaLabel: Content types you can read with ReadWays
landing.featuresTitle: Built for deep reading, not passive memorization.
landing.featuresDescription: ReadWays turns real PDFs into an interactive language-learning workspace.
landing.featureReadDescription: Upload PDFs, articles, essays, or books and read in a focused workspace.
landing.featureContextDescription: Click any unfamiliar word to see what it means in the sentence you are reading.
landing.featureFlashcardsDescription: Save words instantly and review later with sentence-based flashcards.
landing.workflowDescription: ReadWays turns passive reading into active language acquisition.
landing.workflowParagraphOne: Real fluency grows when you stop translating every line and start noticing how words behave together.
landing.workflowParagraphTwoAfter: choices, returning to passages until meaning feels natural.
landing.workflowPopupMeaning: In this sentence: chosen on purpose, describing how skilled readers approach difficult texts.
landing.orbitTitle: Your reading becomes a living vocabulary system.
landing.orbitDescription: Every sentence, highlight, and saved word connects into a personalized learning loop.
landing.orbitParagraphOne: Knowledge stops being scattered when your document becomes the center of learning.
landing.orbitParagraphTwoAfter: , definition, and review cycle orbits what you actually read.
landing.pricingDescription: Start free and upgrade when you want a deeper reading and vocabulary experience.
landing.testimonialsTitle: Loved by readers who learn through real content.
landing.testimonialsDescription: From research papers to long-form articles, ReadWays helps build vocabulary naturally while reading.
landing.testimonial1Quote: ReadWays made reading research papers dramatically less exhausting.
landing.testimonial2Quote: I finally stopped switching between PDFs and translation tabs.
landing.testimonial3Quote: Learning vocabulary inside real sentences changes everything.
landing.finalDescription: Turn every PDF, article, and essay into a personalized language-learning experience.
landing.finalFootnote: No setup friction. Just upload a document and start reading.
landing.mockupDefinitionText: requiring little or no effort; achieved with ease
landing.mockupInYourTextText: Used to contrast passive study with natural fluency—the author suggests tools can make progress feel effortless without removing challenge.
landing.mockupExampleSentence: With practice, reading in a second language can feel effortless.

auth.loginDescription: Sign in to your ReadWays account.
auth.signupDescription: Create your ReadWays account and start learning from PDFs.
auth.callbackFailed: Sign-in could not be completed. Please try again.
auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue your reading and vocabulary progress.
auth.signupSubtitle: Start with Google and open your reading dashboard in seconds.
auth.authNotConfiguredDescription: Authentication must be configured on this environment before you can continue with Google.
auth.routeErrorDescription: This page hit an unexpected error. Your account and saved data are safe.

app.dashboardFirstUpload: Upload your first PDF to start building your vocabulary.
app.dashboardContinueReading: Continue reading or upload a new document to grow your vocabulary.
app.dashboardProgressHint: Upload a PDF, tap words while you read, and save vocabulary. Your stats will appear as you go.
app.dashboardTapWordHint: Tap a word in the reader to save it here.
app.dashboardCaughtUp: You're caught up — check back later.
app.activityTrackProgressHint: Upload a PDF and save words to track progress.
app.librarySubtitle: Your uploaded PDFs and reading materials.
app.libraryLoadErrorBody: Check your connection and try again. Your documents are still safe.
app.libraryFirstPdfBody: Upload a document and build vocabulary while you read — tap words for meanings, save what matters, and review later.
app.documentDeleteBody: This will remove the document, saved words, and flashcards connected to it.
app.documentDeleteFailedToast: Could not delete document. Please try again.
app.dashboardRecentLoadErrorBody: Check your connection and try again.
app.dashboardNoDocumentsBody: Upload a PDF to start reading and saving vocabulary.
app.savedWordsSubtitle: Your personal vocabulary vault — words and phrases collected while reading, ready to revisit anytime.
app.savedWordsNoResultsBody: Try a different search or filter. Your saved words are still here.
app.savedWordsEmptyBody: Tap any word while reading to get an explanation, then save it as a flashcard. Your vocabulary will collect here.
app.flashcardsSubtitle: Review words from your reading with spaced repetition.
app.flashcardsNoDueBody: You're all caught up. Saved words will appear here when they're ready to review.
app.flashcardsHowWellRecall: How well did you recall it?
app.flashcardsFlipHint: Flip the card to rate your recall
app.flashcardsReviewCompleteSingle: You reviewed 1 card this session. Nice work — your memory schedule has been updated.
app.flashcardsReviewCompleteMultipleSuffix: cards this session. Nice work — your memory schedule has been updated.
app.readerNoDocumentBody: Choose a PDF from your library to read and save vocabulary in context.
app.readerDocumentNotFoundBody: This document isn't in your library anymore, or you may not have access to it. Open another PDF from your library to keep reading.
app.readerPreparingPdfBody: We're extracting text so you can read and tap words for explanations. Check back in a moment from your library.
app.readerScannedPdfBody: OCR support is coming soon. For now, try uploading a text-based PDF with selectable text.
app.readerNotReadyBody: This document isn't available in the reader right now. Return to your library to see its status.
app.readerPrepareFailedBody: Text extraction didn't succeed. Try a different file, or upload a PDF with selectable text.
app.readerEmptySelectWordBody: Select any word from your document to understand it in context.
app.uploadDragDrop: Drag and drop your PDF here
app.uploadBrowserExtractHint: Text is extracted in your browser, then saved securely to your library.
app.uploadProcessFailedBody: Try another file, or upload a PDF with selectable text.
app.uploadErrTooLargeBody: This PDF exceeds the 10 MB limit. Please upload a smaller file.
app.uploadErrTooManyPagesBody: This PDF has too many pages. Please upload a document up to 30 pages.
app.uploadErrTooMuchTextTitle: This PDF is too large to prepare
app.uploadErrTooMuchTextBody: This PDF is too large to prepare in the browser. Try a shorter document.
app.uploadErrScannedBody: OCR support is coming soon. For now, try uploading a text-based PDF with selectable text.
app.uploadErrNoTextBody: We couldn't find readable text in this PDF. Try uploading a document with selectable text.
app.uploadErrEncryptedBody: This PDF is password-protected. Please upload an unlocked copy.
app.uploadErrCorruptedBody: We could not read this PDF. The file may be corrupted or incomplete.
app.uploadErrEmptyBody: This file is empty. Choose a different PDF.
app.uploadErrInvalidBody: This file does not look like a valid PDF.
app.uploadErrUnknownBody: We couldn't prepare this PDF. Try another file, or upload a shorter text-based document.
app.onboardingWelcomeDescription: Upload your first PDF, tap words while you read, save what matters, and review later.
app.onboardingTapWord: Tap a word to see its meaning in context.
app.onboardingSelectPhrase: Select a phrase to explain it together.
app.onboardingSaveWords: Save useful words to review later.
app.onboardingRateRecallDescription: Hard brings a card back soon. Good uses the normal schedule. Easy waits longer before you see it again.
app.onboardingPhraseTipBody: Drag across words to select a phrase like “come on” and explain it together.
